ham.subject: This Week's Marketing Highlights - New Offers Inside
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Here’s a quick roundup of this week’s marketing highlights and new offers that are ready to roll out. Please review the attached documents and let me know if you need any revisions.

- New seasonal campaign: "Summer Splash" – launch on June 15.
- Updated pricing tier for Pro plan: 20% discount for first 3 months.
- Influencer partnership: 5 top creators in the niche.

Looking forward to hearing your feedback.

Thanks,
Rahul
